description: mitmproxy is an interactive, SSL/TLS-capable intercepting proxy with a console interface. Allows traffic flow to be intercepted, inspected, modified and replayed.
name: mitmproxy
summary: Intercepting HTTPS proxy for penetration testers.

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
